answer:
<think> The seventeenth episode of a season usually airs around the middle of the season. The twenty-first season of "The Simpsons" had 22 episodes. Fox renewed the show for another season before the twenty-first season had finished airing. Therefore, the seventeenth episode of the twenty-first season was likely aired before the renewal announcement. I need to find out when the twenty-first season started to determine the exact air date. </think>

<answer> The exact air date for the seventeenth episode of "The Simpsons"' twenty-first season cannot be determined without knowing the premiere date of that season.
